name: Chinese Stuffed Mushrooms
recipeIngredient: 1/2 Small red or green pepper, seeded
2 tsp Rice wine or dry sherry
recipeInstructions:
--------------------------BATTER--------------------------
Combine 1/2 cup cornstarch, 1/2 cup all-purpose flour, 1 1/2 teaspoons baking powder, and 3/4 teaspoon salt. Mix in 1/2 cup milk and 1/3 cup water.
FOR MUSHROOMS:
1. Clean mushrooms by wiping with a damp cloth. Remove stems and chop finely. Transfer to a large bowl.
2. Finely chop pork, water chestnuts, green onions, pepper, and celery. Add to chopped mushroom stems. Stir in cornstarch, grated ginger, rice wine, soy sauce, and Hoi sin sauce. Beat egg white until foamy and stir in.
3. Spoon the pork mixture into the cavities of mushroom caps, mounding the mixture in the center.
4. Heat vegetable oil in a wok over high heat until it reaches 375°F (190°C). Carefully dip each mushroom cap first in flour, then coat completely with batter. Fry mushrooms in batches, turning occasionally, until golden brown, about 5 minutes. Remove with a slotted spoon and drain on absorbent paper.
Yield: Serves 2 dozen stuffed mushrooms
